title: Baby #cute #cutebaby #viral #ai #fyp
prompt_text: A dramatic and surreal cliffhanger featuring two infants in diapers on a rocky precipice. One baby clings to the cliff edge over a deep canyon filled with flowing lava, while the other reaches down from the top to help. In the background, a massive volcano erupts with fire and smoke against a hazy sky. The lighting is warm and chaotic, reflecting the volcanic activity.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A dramatic and surreal cliffhanger featuring two infants in diapers on a rocky precipice. One baby clings to the cliff edge over a deep canyon filled with flowing lava, while the other reaches down from the top to help. In the background, a massive volcano erupts with fire and smoke against a hazy sky. The lighting is warm and chaotic, reflecting the volcanic activity.

cinematography.cameraShot: Vertical medium shot, static camera, focusing on the precarious physical interaction between the two infants against the volcanic backdrop.

actions: The infant on the cliff top reaches down and grabs the arm of the hanging infant.
The infant hanging over the ledge kicks its legs and cries out in distress.
The top infant leans forward, attempting to pull the other to safety.
Lava flows visibly in the ravine below and the volcano in the background continuously erupts.
dialogue: [Sound of babies crying loudly and distressed]
[Deep rumble of volcanic eruption and crackling fire]
